# ZeroLang Agent Compiler MCP

Paid remote MCP for ZeroLang, structured receipts, usage logs, and audit-ready JSON evidence.

Website: https://zerolangcompiler.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://zerolangcompiler.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://zerolangcompiler.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/zerolang-agent-compiler-mcp-mcp

Use case: ZeroLang Agent Compiler MCP remote MCP for ZeroLang.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: compile_zerolang_program, run_zerolang_fixtures, explain_compile_error, export_agent_plan_json
